description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that runs on every pull request. Use a matrix job strategy on ubuntu-latest to build with different combinations of LMS_BUILD_TYPE (Release, Debug), LMS_UNITY_BUILD (ON, OFF), and LMS_IMAGE_BACKEND (stb, graphicsmagick). Check out the repository, cache Docker layers, set up Docker Buildx, and then build using the Dockerfile-build-arch with the specified build arguments and caching.
